comment: Prefer the older version. Pros of the new version: appreciate that modern UI/UX design; Cons: The latest one does not have auto-correct suggestions when we spell a word wrong. Secondly, in tap to translate, when you hit the "translate" button and the "pronounce" button immediately, the pop-up just goes away Moreover, there's not a button for us to switch/swap the language in tap to translate. Finally, please bring back the auto paste from clipboard feature, that would be helpful and time saving
key sentence: tap to translate, auto-correct, auto paste
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
